bypass_cable: 40-PIN BCM Cable Required for AKL - Autel IM608 Program Mitsubishi Outlander 2021-2025 All Keys Lost with 40 PIN Cable - Need to extend OBD2 PORT cable as it wont reach for RHD Vehicles - Launch Autel IM608 and select Mitsubishi > Outlander 2021 and newer Navigate to Control Unit- Keyless System CAN- Key Learning If no communication go to Hot Function- Key Learning Guided menu - Step 2 Get key ID - OBDSTAR X300 DP Plus and G3 will program Mitsubishi Outlander 2021- smart key Supports both add key and all keys lost You also need OBDSTAR 40-PIN cable to bypass pin code - Xhorse BCM40 cable from Xhorse - IMMO Programming->Mitsubishi->Select by area->North America->Outlander->2022 up->Smart Key To bypass pin code you also need BCM40 cable
process_if_not_obd: Requires 40-PIN BCM Cable for AKL - Autel IM608 Program Mitsubishi Outlander 2021-2025 All Keys Lost with 40 PIN Cable - Need to extend OBD2 PORT cable as it wont reach for RHD - Launch Autel IM608 and select Mitsubishi > Outlander 2021 and newer Navigate to Control Unit- Keyless System CAN- Key Learning - If no communication go to Hot Function- Key Learning Guided menu - OBDSTAR X300 DP Plus and G3 will program Mitsubishi Outlander 2021- smart key Supports both add key and all keys lost You also need OBDSTAR 40-PIN cable to bypass pin code - Xhorse BCM40 cable - IMMO Programming->Mitsubishi->Select by area->North America->Outlander->2022 up->Smart Key To bypass pin code you also need BCM40 cable

im508s_compatible: Yes - IM508S supports - Autel IM608 Program Mitsubishi Outlander 2021-2025 All Keys Lost with 40 PIN Cable - This procedure can be applied to 2021-2025 Outlander - Autel IM608 II or IM508 - New key fobs ensure compatible - Launch Autel IM608 and select Mitsubishi > Outlander 2021 and newer Navigate to Control Unit- Keyless System CAN- Key Learning - If no communication go to Hot Function- Key Learning Guided menu - Requires 40-PIN BCM Cable - Need to extend OBD2 PORT cable as it wont reach for RHD - OBDSTAR X300 DP Plus and G3 will program Mitsubishi Outlander 2021- smart key Supports both add key and all keys lost You also need OBDSTAR 40-PIN cable to bypass pin code - Xhorse BCM40 cable
keydiy_kdx4_compatible: Yes - KD-X4 supports - How to Synchronize NCF29AX Smart Key by KEYDIY KD-X4 - Step 4 Write data to KD ZB71 remote Use 6-pin programming cable to connect KD 29AX/29A7 smart card to KD-X4 key programmer Then snap key shell onto KD ZB remote Key Advantage No need to program key in vehicle after writing KD remote Simply test both KEYDIY ZB71 smart remote key and original key to confirm all functions operate normally - How to Synchronize NCF29AX Series Key by Keydiy KD-X4 Remote Chip Reading Adapter and C29AX71 Smart Key - Step 4 Write data to KD ZB71 remote Use 6-pin programming cable to connect KD C29AX/C29A7 smart card to your KD-X4 key programmer Hit Generate dealer key success Press enter - Then snap key shell onto KD C29AX71 Smart Remote Best part No need to program key in car after writing KD remote
